name: dev-workflow-v2
description: dev-workflow-60 (64 EN cases) + 28 JA/mixed cases (S154-500). Shared pool = all entries.

cases.description: 先週の変更ファイル問い合わせ

entries.content: Refactored authentication middleware in auth/middleware.ts. Replaced JWT validation with session-based check. Added rate limiting per user.
Updated database schema: added users.last_login column and session_tokens table. Ran migration successfully.
Fixed bug in payment processing where duplicate charges occurred on retry. Added idempotency key to Stripe API calls.

cases.query: What files did I change last week?

cases.description: バグ修正時期の問い合わせ

entries.content: Investigated memory leak in observation-store.ts. SQLite WAL mode causing unbounded growth on high write load.
Fixed memory leak: added checkpoint interval every 1000 writes. WAL file now stays under 50MB. Deployed to staging.
Memory leak fix deployed to production. Monitoring shows WAL size stable at 30-40MB under normal load.

cases.query: When was the memory leak bug fixed?

cases.description: CI失敗原因の問い合わせ

entries.content: CI pipeline passing on main branch. All 1278 tests green. Build time: 2m 34s.
CI failed on PR #142. Error: Cannot find module 'bun:sqlite' in test environment. Node.js runner used instead of Bun.
Fixed CI: switched test runner back to Bun in .github/workflows/test.yml. PR #142 now passing.

cases.query: Why did CI fail recently?

cases.description: 設計判断の問い合わせ

entries.content: Considered using PostgreSQL for better full-text search. Decided against it: SQLite sufficient for single-user local deployment. Avoid operational complexity.
Implemented vector embeddings using 64-dimensional space instead of 384-dim. Trade-off: lower quality vs 6x faster indexing. Acceptable for MVP.
Architecture decision: keep all storage in SQLite with FTS5 + vector extension. No external dependencies for core functionality.

cases.query: Why did we choose SQLite over PostgreSQL?

cases.description: 最新設定値の問い合わせ

entries.content: Default embedding dimension set to 128. Performance tests show 128-dim gives good recall@10 for typical query lengths.
Reduced embedding dimension to 64 after benchmarks. 64-dim achieves 94% of 128-dim recall at 40% lower latency. Updated config default.

cases.query: What is the current embedding dimension?

cases.description: パフォーマンス問題の調査

entries.content: Profiled search latency. p50=45ms, p95=320ms, p99=890ms. High variance on queries with many results.
Root cause: reranker BM25 calculation running O(n^2) for large result sets. Implemented batch scoring to reduce to O(n log n).
After optimization: p50=22ms, p95=85ms, p99=210ms. 4x improvement at p95. Deployed to production.

cases.query: What was causing the high search latency?

cases.description: 依存関係バージョンの問い合わせ

entries.content: Using Bun 1.2.0 as runtime. Upgraded from 1.1.38. New features: improved SQLite performance, better TypeScript support.
Upgraded Bun to 1.3.6 to fix crash in test runner on macOS Silicon. No breaking changes in our usage.

cases.query: What version of Bun are we using?

entries.content: TODO: implement query result caching to reduce repeated embedding computations. Estimated 30% latency improvement.
TODO: add streaming response support for MCP server. Currently buffers all results before sending.
TODO caching: deprioritized. Cache invalidation complexity too high given frequent writes. Will revisit in §35.

cases.query: What TODOs are still open?

cases.description: デプロイ時刻の問い合わせ

entries.content: Released v0.2.0. Changes: bilingual search, freshness routing, 50-case knowledge-update benchmark.
Released v0.3.0. Major changes: §32 benchmark CI, temporal ordering, Bootstrap CI implementation.

cases.query: When was v0.3.0 released?

cases.description: テスト失敗の原因追跡

entries.content: Test suite: reranker quality gate failing. Expected recall >= 0.85, actual 0.72. Regression from PR #138.
Root cause of recall regression: PR #138 changed BM25 title weight from 5.0 to 2.0 without updating test baseline. Baseline updated.
Reranker quality gate passing after baseline update. recall=0.91, mrr=0.88. PR #138 approved.

cases.query: Why was the reranker quality gate failing?

entries.content: Search module owned by Alice. She implemented the original vector retrieval pipeline in §28.
Alice on leave. Bob taking over search module ownership. Onboarding session completed.

cases.query: Who owns the search module now?

cases.description: APIエンドポイントの仕様変更

entries.content: Search API: POST /search accepts {query, limit, project}. Returns up to 10 results by default.
Updated search API: added include_private and sector parameters. Default limit increased to 20. Breaking change: old clients may receive more results.

cases.query: What parameters does the search API accept?

cases.description: 直近のスプリント目標

entries.content: Sprint §33 goal: improve search quality. F1 target: 0.27. Freshness target: 0.80.
Sprint §33 completed. F1=0.287 (target met). Freshness=0.88 (target met, but train=test bias suspected).
Sprint §34 goal: fix measurement reliability. Fix temporal fixture (ASC-only score < 0.7). Fix freshness CV bias.

cases.query: What is the current sprint goal?

cases.description: コードレビューコメントの追跡

entries.content: PR #145 review: suggestion to add error handling in appendQueryLog. Currently silently ignores write errors.
PR #145 review: alternative suggestion - use structured logging instead of raw JSONL. Easier to query.
PR #145 merged. Kept JSONL format (simpler, no deps). Error handling: catch and ignore (log failures must not impact search).

cases.query: What was decided about error handling in the query log?

cases.description: 環境変数の仕様問い合わせ

entries.content: Environment variables: HARNESS_MEM_DECAY_DISABLED=1 disables time-based score decay. HARNESS_MEM_RERANKER_ENABLED=1 enables BM25 reranking.
Added new env vars: HARNESS_BENCH_FRESHNESS_GATE (default 0.30), HARNESS_BENCH_TEMPORAL_GATE (default 0.50). Override CI thresholds.
Added HARNESS_MEM_QUERY_LOG env var. Set to file path to enable JSONL query logging. Privacy: only category/length recorded, not full query text.

cases.query: How do I enable query logging?

entries.content: Initial plan: implement Graph traversal for multi-hop reasoning. Estimated 2 sprint effort.
Graph traversal de-prioritized. F1 improvement from vector search alone sufficient for §33 goals. Revisit in §35.
§34 scope confirmed: no graph traversal. Focus on measurement reliability only. Graph traversal remains §35+ scope.

cases.query: Why was Graph traversal de-prioritized?

cases.description: スコア改善の定量追跡

entries.content: §31 F1 score: 0.179. Baseline established with locomo-120 dataset.
§32 F1 score: 0.212. Improvement: +0.033 from BM25 reranking and freshness routing.
§33 F1 score: 0.287. Improvement: +0.075 from temporal ordering and improved answer normalization.

cases.query: What is the latest F1 score?

cases.description: ミーティング決定事項の追跡

entries.content: Team meeting 2026-02-20: discussed LLM judge evaluation. Cost: ~$50/run. Reproducibility concerns due to model updates.
Decision from meeting: skip LLM judge for now. Use automated metrics (F1, Recall, Temporal Order Score) only. Revisit if automated metrics plateau.

cases.query: Why did we decide not to use LLM judge evaluation?

cases.description: テストカバレッジ変化の追跡

entries.content: Test count: 956 tests across 142 files after §32. Coverage added for temporal ordering and Bootstrap CI.
Test count: 1278 tests across 167 files after §33. New tests: bilingual recall, freshness CV, Holm-Bonferroni correction.
Test count: 1343 tests across 172 files after §34 Phase A-B. New tests: temporal-100, knowledge-update-100, 3-layer CI gate.

cases.query: How many tests are there currently?

cases.description: 次のマイルストーンの確認

entries.content: §34 milestone: fix measurement reliability. 4 metrics must have Bootstrap CI. Temporal fixture must have reverse-order cases.
§34 completion criteria: Temporal Weighted Kendall tau >= 0.70 (CI lower bound). Freshness@K >= 0.70 (post-CV). bilingual recall >= 0.85 (N=50).
§35 scope preview: multi-hop reasoning (Graph traversal), 384-dim embeddings, LoCoMo 200-sample expansion. Start after §34 completion.

cases.query: What comes after §34 is complete?

entries.content: Updated scripts/notify-on-failure.ts to include the failed job name and retry URL in Slack messages.
Kept .github/workflows/ci.yml unchanged after confirming the notification script already receives GITHUB_RUN_ID.
Verified the failure notification payload locally with HARNESS_MEM_NOTIFY_DRY_RUN=1.

cases.query: Which file did we edit for failure notifications?

entries.content: Created src/flags/cleanup.ts to remove expired feature flags after release promotion.
Left src/flags/index.ts as a thin export surface for cleanupFeatureFlags and readFeatureFlagState.
Added a note that cleanup runs only in maintenance mode, not during user prompt handling.

cases.query: Where did we put the feature flag cleanup logic?

entries.content: Added Stripe signature verification in api/webhooks/stripe.ts before JSON parsing.
Rejected a helper in api/webhooks/shared.ts because raw body access is route-specific.
Regression test posts a bad stripe-signature header and expects HTTP 400.

cases.query: Which file has the new Stripe webhook signature verification?

entries.content: Fixed strict project filtering in memory-server/src/core/project-scope.ts by canonicalizing worktree paths.
Did not touch memory-server/src/core/privacy-filter.ts; privacy behavior stayed unchanged.
Added a regression note: sibling worktrees must not share observations when strict_project=true.

cases.query: What file should I inspect for the workspace isolation fix?

entries.content: Started branch codex/s108-dev-workflow-fixture for S108-002 fixture expansion.
Kept Plans.md untouched because the parent integrator owns final S108 status updates.
Scoped writes to dev-workflow fixtures, S108 dev-workflow artifacts, and validation tests.

cases.query: What branch was used for the S108 developer-workflow fixture work?

entries.content: Opened codex/windows-doctor-paths to fix stale absolute path detection on Git Bash.
The branch adds checks for ~/.codex/config.toml and ~/.codex/hooks.json path drift.
Follow-up branch codex/windows-doctor-docs is only for README wording.

cases.query: Which branch contains the Windows doctor path fix?

entries.content: Paused codex/graph-signal-spike after the prototype required a second graph database.
Decision: keep graph signal work behind HARNESS_MEM_TEMPORAL_GRAPH=1 until SQLite-only design is clear.
New branch codex/local-graph-signal should start from the design note, not the abandoned spike.

cases.query: Which branch did we abandon for the graph signal spike?

entries.content: Implemented doctor JSON fields on codex/companion-doctor-json.
The branch exposes contract_version and harness_mem_version for the managed companion.
Merged after claude-code-harness verified it did not depend on internal DB paths.

cases.query: What branch carried the companion doctor JSON contract?

cases.description: PR number for Bun runner fix

entries.content: PR #214 added a safe Bun runner wrapper around benchmark smoke tests.
The fix catches Bun panic output and exits with a clear diagnostic instead of hanging.
PR #214 was merged after rerank-quality-gate.test.ts passed locally.

cases.query: Which PR fixed the Bun runner panic wrapper?

entries.content: PR #218 changed the search cache key to include the latest observation sequence.
Before PR #218, repeated queries could return stale results after recordEvent.
The PR added a focused test in memory-server/tests/core-split/search-cache.test.ts.

cases.query: Which PR fixed cache invalidation after observation writes?

entries.content: Opened PR #221 for privacy filter cleanup in the MCP search path.
Reviewer requested contract tests for include_private=false before approval.
Added tests proving private observations are excluded from MCP and HTTP search responses.

cases.query: What did the reviewer request on PR #221?

entries.content: PR #223 changed setup flags for --skip-smoke and --skip-quality.
CI passed on PR #223, but review blocked merge because README_ja.md was not updated.
Follow-up commit synchronized README.md, README_ja.md, and docs/harness-mem-setup.md.

cases.query: Why was PR #223 blocked?

entries.content: Opened issue #71 for duplicate Codex session_end observations from repeated finalize calls.
The issue labels are bug, ingest, and codex-parity.
Proposed fix is semantic dedup by session_id, observation_type, and content_hash.

cases.query: Which issue tracks duplicate session_end observations?

entries.content: Issue #75 reports private observations appearing when include_private=false.
Reproduction uses one public note and one privacy_tags=['private'] note in the same project.
Root cause is an HTTP search path bypassing applyPrivacyFilter after rerank.

cases.query: What is issue #75 about?

entries.content: Issue #82 covers stale resume packs being injected after a new session starts.
The stale artifact was .claude/state/memory-resume-pack.json from 12 days earlier.
Fix direction: validate generated_at and upstream session identity before suppressing recall.

cases.query: Which issue covers stale resume packs on new sessions?

entries.content: Issue #88 tracks npm package payload drift after mcp-server/dist was omitted.
The issue requires npm pack --dry-run --json evidence before release promotion.
Resolution criterion: package includes scripts, mcp-server/dist, sdk, and docs.

cases.query: What was the package manifest issue number?

entries.content: Created migration 20260501_add_content_hash.sql to add observations.content_hash.
Backfill computes sha256 of normalized observation content for semantic dedup.
Rollback drops the content_hash index before dropping the column.

cases.query: Which migration added observations.content_hash?

entries.content: Prepared 20260502_backfill_vector_status.sql for rows missing vector_status.
Dry-run found 418 observations with embeddings but null vector_status.
The migration is idempotent and updates only rows where vector_status is null.

cases.query: Which migration backfills vector_status?

entries.content: Documented semantic dedup dry-run command: bun run scripts/migrate-db.ts --plan semantic-dedup --dry-run.
Execute mode removes --dry-run after the duplicate count matches the migration preflight.
The plan writes a backup under .harness-mem/backups before mutating the database.

cases.query: What command runs the semantic dedup migration plan?

entries.content: Deferred migration adding fact_edges.valid_from and fact_edges.valid_to until temporal contract review.
Do not add temporal graph columns before S108-007 defines event_time and valid_from semantics.
Current S108-002 fixture work must not touch temporal migration files.

cases.query: Which temporal graph migration is still pending?

entries.content: Staging deploy target is harness-mem-staging for smoke testing daemon API changes.
Production deploy is intentionally skipped for fixture-only benchmark work.
Health check path remains /health after staging deploy.

cases.query: What is the staging deploy target for harness-mem?

entries.content: Recommended local runtime update command: node scripts/harness-mem.js update --restart.
The command syncs the stable runtime copy and restarts harness-memd if it is running.
After update, run node scripts/harness-mem.js doctor --json --platform codex --skip-version-check.

cases.query: What command updates the local runtime and restarts it?

entries.content: Release deploy failed because the darwin-arm64 asset was missing from the upload set.
The linux-x64 and darwin-x64 assets uploaded successfully.
Re-ran the build matrix and verified all four platform assets before publishing.

cases.query: Why did the release deploy fail?

entries.content: Staging deploy completed for commit a1b2c3d with health status healthy.
The deploy included doctor JSON contract changes but no database migration.
Post-deploy smoke checked /health, /stats, and /v1/sessions.

cases.query: Which commit was deployed to staging?

entries.content: doctor-json-contract.test.ts failed because doctor --json did not include contract_version.
Added contract_version to the JSON payload with value claude-harness-companion.v1.
The focused test passed after adding harness_mem_version and contract_version.

cases.query: Which test failed because contract_version was missing?

entries.content: dev-workflow recall stayed around 0.54 after manifest emission work.
Failure taxonomy points to BM25 tokenization missing camelCase, kebab-case, path, and PR tokens.
S108-004 should tune code-aware lexical normalization after S108-003 ablation.

cases.query: Why was dev-workflow recall stuck around 0.54?

entries.content: Playwright memory list test failed because the stale fixture seed still expected 6 rows.
The UI correctly rendered 7 rows after adding the new resume-pack observation.
Fixed by updating the fixture seed and keeping the selector unchanged.

cases.query: Why did the UI memory list Playwright test fail?

entries.content: tests/contextual-recall-contract.test.ts failed when stale pending_resume_skip suppressed a fresh recall.
Fix clears pending_resume_skip after the upstream resume identity no longer matches.
Regression proves the next Codex prompt still emits harness-recall guidance.

cases.query: Which test covered stale pending_resume_skip behavior?

entries.content: Prepared release note for v0.18.0 after doctor and setup contracts turned green.
v0.18.0 includes Codex wiring repair, companion doctor JSON, and package payload checks.
No README claim changes were included in the release tag.

cases.query: What was the latest release tag in the release note?

entries.content: npm release blocked because npm pack --dry-run showed mcp-server/dist was missing.
package.json files list was corrected to include the built MCP server output.
Release resumed only after npm pack --dry-run --json showed the expected payload.

cases.query: What blocked the npm release?

entries.content: Added the companion doctor JSON contract note to CHANGELOG.md.
Release review required the same note in CHANGELOG_ja.md before tagging.
Both changelogs mention contract_version and harness_mem_version fields.

cases.query: Which changelog needed the companion doctor note?

entries.content: v0.18.0-rc.1 failed package payload verification.
v0.18.0-rc.2 passed npm pack, doctor, and focused Codex wiring tests.
Stable v0.18.0 was promoted from v0.18.0-rc.2 without retagging history.

cases.query: Which RC was promoted to the stable release?

entries.content: For Codex wiring, run node scripts/harness-mem.js setup --platform codex --skip-version-check.
The command updates ~/.codex/config.toml and installs the harness-mem skills.
Use --skip-smoke only when daemon startup is intentionally out of scope.

cases.query: What setup command should I run for Codex wiring?

entries.content: Codex setup updates ~/.codex/config.toml with the harness MCP server entry.
Codex setup also merges ~/.codex/hooks.json for notification and prompt hooks.
The setup command must preserve unrelated user-defined Codex MCP entries.

cases.query: Which Codex files does setup update?

entries.content: Windows setup requires Git Bash path normalization before writing hook command paths.
Without normalization, doctor reports stale absolute paths after moving the repo.
The setup test runs under a simulated Git Bash home directory.

cases.query: What does Windows setup require?

entries.content: Added --skip-smoke for setup runs where daemon health checks are intentionally skipped.
--skip-quality skips benchmark quality checks but still allows daemon smoke checks.
Docs warn that release verification should not use --skip-smoke.

cases.query: Which flag skips setup smoke checks?

entries.content: doctor --json reports multi_db_warning when plugin-scoped and stable DB files both exist.
The warning does not fail doctor because migration may be pending.
The suggested fix is scripts/migrations/merge-plugin-scoped-dbs.sh --dry-run first.

cases.query: What doctor warning appears for multiple databases?

entries.content: Healthy Codex doctor output has status=healthy and all_green=true.
The codex_wiring check reports ok when config.toml, hooks.json, and notify script paths are valid.
failed_count should be 0 in the same JSON response.

cases.query: What should Codex doctor report when wiring is healthy?

entries.content: Doctor found stale Codex hook paths pointing at an archived worktree.
Fix was to remove old repo paths from ~/.codex/hooks.json and rerun setup.
After setup, doctor confirmed notify script and MCP entrypoint paths point at the current repo.

cases.query: How did we fix stale Codex hook paths?

entries.content: Added failed_count to doctor --json so automation can decide whether to block setup.
The field is numeric and counts only failed checks, not warnings.
Warnings remain available under warnings[] for human-readable diagnostics.

cases.query: Which doctor JSON field counts failed checks?

entries.content: The managed companion contract version is claude-harness-companion.v1.
harness-mem doctor --json exposes the contract_version field for Claude-harness.
Claude-harness must not inspect harness-mem internal database paths.

cases.query: What is the managed companion contract version?

entries.content: Companion auto-setup state is stored in .claude/state/harness-mem-companion-setup.json.
The state file prevents repeating setup on every Setup:init run.
Deleting the state file forces Claude-harness to evaluate companion setup again.

cases.query: Where is companion auto-setup state stored?

entries.content: Claude-harness exposes harness mem off to disable the managed companion path.
The command should not delete the harness-mem database.
Users can re-enable the path with harness mem setup after confirming doctor output.

cases.query: What command turns the managed companion off?

entries.content: harness-mem owns the companion runtime implementation, including setup, doctor, update, and uninstall.
claude-code-harness owns the developer UX wrapper and calls only stable companion commands.
Do not reimplement memory storage or search inside claude-code-harness.

cases.query: Who owns the companion runtime implementation?

entries.content: カナリアデプロイの比率を 5% から 25% に変更してリリースした。問題なければ来週 50% に上げる。
デプロイ手順書の誤字を修正し、承認者リストを更新した。
先月のデプロイ頻度レポートをまとめて共有した。

cases.query: 昨日のデプロイで何が変わった？
cases.expected_answer: カナリア比率が 5% から 25% に変更された

entries.content: アクセストークンの期限を 15 分に短縮、リフレッシュトークンは 7 日に設定した。
トークン検証のエラーログが増えていたが原因は時計ずれだった。NTP 設定を修正。
認証画面のデザイン刷新は来スプリントに延期。

cases.query: 認証トークンの期限はいくつにした？
cases.expected_answer: アクセストークン 15 分、リフレッシュトークン 7 日

entries.content: 分析系のクエリは全部リードレプリカに振り分けることに決めた。プライマリは書き込みと OLTP のみ。
Analytics dashboard queries were timing out during the morning peak; investigation ongoing.
The analytics team requested three new materialized views for the quarterly report.

cases.query: Where did we decide to keep analytics queries?
cases.expected_answer: リードレプリカに振り分ける（プライマリは書き込みのみ）

entries.content: 商品キャッシュの TTL を 3600 秒から 300 秒に短縮。価格改定の反映が遅いというクレーム対応。
キャッシュサーバーのメモリ増設を申請した。承認待ち。
TTL 統一の議論は結論が出ず、サービス別に決める方針になった。

cases.query: キャッシュの TTL 変更の理由は？
cases.expected_answer: 価格反映を速くするため 3600 秒から 300 秒に短縮

entries.content: 公開 API の rate limit を 100 req/min から 60 req/min に引き下げた。超過時は 429 を返す。
rate limit の緩和申請が 3 社から来ている。enterprise プランの検討材料にする。
内部サービス間の呼び出しは rate limit 対象外であることをドキュメントに明記した。

cases.query: rate limit の現在値は？
cases.expected_answer: 60 req/min（100 から引き下げ、超過は 429）

entries.content: flaky テストは隔離レーンに移動し、3 回連続で成功したら本線に戻す運用に決定。
テストカバレッジが 78% に落ちたので変更ファイルの 80% ゲートに引っかかる PR が増えた。
E2E テストの実行環境を本番相当のシードデータに変更した。

cases.query: flaky テストはどう運用することにした？
cases.expected_answer: 隔離レーンに移し 3 回連続成功で本線復帰

entries.content: トレーシングのサンプリング率を 1% から 10% に上げた。エラーの時は 100% 記録する。
Tracing storage costs grew 4x after the sampling change; finance asked for a forecast.
The tracing UI upgrade to the new query language is scheduled for next month.

cases.query: What is the new trace sampling rate?

entries.content: スペル補正を導入してゼロヒット率を 12% から 4% に下げた。
検索結果の facet 集計を別クエリに分離する設計をレビュー中。
ゼロヒット時のおすすめ表示はプロダクト側で仕様検討中。

cases.query: 検索のゼロヒット対策は何を入れた？
cases.expected_answer: スペル補正（ゼロヒット率 12%→4%）

entries.content: 請求書発行を月末締め翌 3 営業日から翌 1 営業日に前倒しした。経理と合意済み。
請求書テンプレートのロゴを新ブランドに差し替えた。
月次の請求エラー率は 0.3% で前月と横ばい。

cases.query: 請求書の発行タイミングは？
cases.expected_answer: 月末締め翌 1 営業日（3 営業日から前倒し）

entries.content: バンドルサイズを 2.1MB から 780KB に削減。chart ライブラリの動的 import が効いた。
画像フォーマットを AVIF 優先に変更し、WebP をフォールバックにした。
バンドル分析レポートを毎週月曜に自動生成するようにした。

cases.query: バンドルサイズはどこまで減った？

entries.content: DLQ のメッセージは 24 時間ごとにバッチで再処理し、3 回失敗したら破棄する運用にした。
The DLQ alert fired twice this week; both were schema mismatches from the legacy producer.
Consumer lag alerts are set at 10k warning and 50k critical.

cases.query: How are DLQ messages handled now?
cases.expected_answer: 24 時間ごとにバッチ再処理、3 回失敗で破棄

entries.content: API キーのローテーションを 90 日で自動化した。旧キーは 7 日間の猶予後に失効する。
キー管理画面に最終使用日時を表示する機能を追加した。
漏洩検知の secret scanning は全リポジトリで有効化済み。

cases.query: API キーのローテーション周期は？
cases.expected_answer: 90 日自動、旧キーは 7 日猶予で失効

entries.content: アップロード上限を 25MB から 100MB に拡大し、分割アップロードを必須にした。
大容量ファイルの failed upload に対するエラーメッセージを改善した。
ストレージのライフサイクル設定で 90 日後に IA へ移行するようにした。

cases.query: アップロード上限はいくつになった？
cases.expected_answer: 100MB（25MB から拡大、分割アップロード必須）

entries.content: コネクションプールの上限を 20 から 50 に引き上げた。キュー待ち p95 が 200ms を超えたため。
ステージング環境のプール上限は 20 のまま据え置き（インスタンスが小さいため）。
接続リーク検出のため idle 接続のログ出力を有効にした。

cases.query: コネクションプールの上限は今いくつ？

entries.content: CSS は Tailwind に統一し、styled-components の新規利用は禁止と決めた。既存は段階移行。
The design system tokens were synced with Figma and published as a package.
A codemod to migrate legacy styled-components is being evaluated.

cases.query: What did we decide about styled-components?
cases.expected_answer: 新規利用は禁止、Tailwind に統一

entries.content: アラート通知を severity 別に分けた。P1 だけ電話、P2 は Slack 通知にする。
オンコールのローテーション表を四半期分まとめて作成した。
誤報の多かった disk usage アラートの閾値を 85% から 92% に調整。

cases.query: オンコール通知のルールはどうなった？
cases.expected_answer: P1 は電話、P2 は Slack

entries.content: webhook の retry は exponential backoff で最大 5 回、間隔は 1 分から 16 分にした。
webhook の署名検証を必須化するアナウンスをパートナーに送付した。
失敗 webhook のダッシュボードを作って配信成功率 99.2% を確認。

cases.query: webhook の retry 設定は？
cases.expected_answer: exponential backoff で最大 5 回（1m〜16m）

entries.content: ログ保持をホットストレージ 30 日、コールドは 13 ヶ月に設定変更した。
ログの PII マスキングは ingestion 側で行う方針にした。
古いログ基盤の廃止は移行完了後の 4 月末を予定。

cases.query: ログの保持期間は？
cases.expected_answer: ホット 30 日、コールド 13 ヶ月

entries.content: タイムアウトは gateway 30 秒、上流サービス 10 秒の段階構成に変更した。
Timeout tuning for the batch endpoints is still under discussion with the data team.
A retry storm was traced to a client retrying on 504 without backoff.

cases.query: Which timeout values are in effect now?
cases.expected_answer: gateway 30 秒、上流サービス 10 秒

entries.content: trial を 14 日から 30 日に延長し、クレジットカード登録を不要にした。
trial 経由の有料転換率は 8.2% で目標の 10% に未達。施策検討中。
年額プランの割引率変更は pricing committee で審議中。

cases.query: trial 期間はどう変えた？
cases.expected_answer: 14 日から 30 日に延長、カード登録不要

entries.content: インデックス再構築はブルーグリーン方式にした。新 index を別名で構築して alias を原子的に切り替える。
再構築中の検索レイテンシ悪化は確認されなかった。
同義語辞書の自動抽出は月次バッチで運用開始。

cases.query: インデックス再構築の方式は？
cases.expected_answer: ブルーグリーン（別 index を作って alias を原子的に切替）

entries.content: CI の所要時間を 28 分から 9 分に短縮した。テストを 4 並列に分割したのが効いた。
CI のキャッシュヒット率が 60% に低下していたので key 設計を見直した。
nightly ビルドの失敗通知を担当チームに直接送るようにした。

cases.query: CI はどれくらい速くなった？
cases.expected_answer: 28 分から 9 分（4 並列分割）

entries.content: 署名付き URL の有効期限は 15 分にして、単一オブジェクトと単一メソッドに限定した。
Upload virus scanning quarantines files until the async scan completes.
The storage cleanup job removed 2TB of orphaned objects last month.

cases.query: How long do presigned URLs last?
cases.expected_answer: 15 分（単一オブジェクト・単一メソッドに限定）

entries.content: コンシューマーグループ再設計でリバランスの停止時間が 30 秒から 2 秒になった。
outbox pattern の導入で DB commit とメッセージ発行の整合を保証した。
broker 増設は network 帯域の確認待ちで保留。

cases.query: Kafka のリバランス改善の結果は？
cases.expected_answer: 停止時間が 30 秒から 2 秒に短縮

entries.content: 本番の環境変数を Vault に移行し、デプロイ時に動的 inject する方式にした。DB 資格情報は 4 時間リース。
Vault の監査ログを四半期レビューの対象に追加した。
breakglass 手順は 2 人承認と全操作録画を必須にした。

cases.query: Vault 移行で何が変わった？
cases.expected_answer: 本番環境変数が動的 inject になった（DB 資格情報は 4 時間リース）

entries.content: LCP を 3.8 秒から 2.1 秒に改善した。hero 画像の preload と font swap が効いた。
CLS の悪化が広告枠の遅延ロードで発生していたため、枠サイズを事前確保した。
パフォーマンス計測は CrUX と Lab data の両方をダッシュボード化した。

cases.query: LCP の改善結果は？

entries.content: dunning は 3 回 retry して失敗したら subscription を past_due にする仕様で確定。
Stripe Tax への移管で自前の tax table を廃止した。
Refunds remain automatic within 180 days; older ones route to finance approval.

cases.query: What changed in the dunning flow?
cases.expected_answer: 3 回 retry 後に subscription を past_due にする

entries.content: GraphQL は query depth を 10 に制限し、complexity score が 1000 を超えたら reject する。
persisted query の導入は client 側の対応待ち。
GraphQL の n+1 対策として dataloader の利用を必須にした。

cases.query: GraphQL のクエリ制限は？
